series_metadata.series_description: Annual and quarterly statements from limited lines companies.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Approved: In office until March 1 of following year; then destroy. Non-Approved: In office until December 31 the following year; then destroy. ; Paper: Approved: In office until March 1 of following year; then destroy. Non-Approved: In office until December 31 the following year; then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
